user.title: Connect to AstralPool ConnectMyPool
user.description: Enter your Pool API Code from the ConnectMyPool Home Automation settings page.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the ConnectMyPool API. Please check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Pool API Code. Please check your code and try again.
error.api_not_enabled: API access has not been enabled for this pool. Please request access via the ConnectMyPool website.
error.pool_not_connected: Your pool system is not currently connected to ConnectMyPool.
